---
title: "My Projects"
---

Here is a list of some of my projects:

* [_A Grammar of Standard Classical Arabic_](https://adamiturabi.github.io/arabic-tutorial-book/)  
  This is an online book, rendered using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/), that aims to teach students Standard Classical Arabic.
  It is a work in progress.
* [Minimum(ish) Working Example of Quarto with Arabic RTL text in an LTR document](https://adamiturabi.github.io/quarto-arabic-mwe)
* [Hava Arabic Dictionary digitization project ](https://adamiturabi.github.io/hava-dig)  
  (work in progress)
